nodes.label: Tomorrowland Favicon (SVG)
nodes.description: 40x40 favicon for the Tomorrowland application. Dark navy/near-black rounded square background (#060c1a, rx=5). Foreground artwork is entirely rendered in cyan (#00e5ff) with a soft glow filter (feGaussianBlur). The icon depicts two graph/network nodes: two circles (left at x=10, right at x=30, both at y=27) each with radial spoke lines suggesting graph vertices with edges emanating outward. Each node center is filled with a solid cyan dot. Connecting these two nodes is a triangular wireframe structure in the upper-center — lines forming a polygon/mesh shape with an apex near y=9–15 and base anchored to both node circles, suggesting a network topology or knowledge-graph motif. A horizontal bar element near the top-left of the mesh and a vertical stem rising from the upper-right corner of the triangle add additional structural detail. The overall aesthetic is a dark-mode tech/data icon evoking graph databases, network maps, or document-relationship visualization — consistent with a document intelligence or RAG platform brand.
nodes.icon_style: flat line icon, monochrome cyan on dark navy, glow filter
nodes.shapes: rounded rectangle background, two outer node circles with radial spokes, two solid filled center dots, triangular wireframe mesh connecting nodes, horizontal bar, vertical stem
nodes.purpose: Browser favicon and brand mark for the Tomorrowland frontend application
